query: SELECT id, name, menuSlug, CASE WHEN coverImage IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_COVER' ELSE 'NO_COVER' END as cover_status, CASE WHEN logo IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_LOGO' ELSE 'NO_LOGO' END as logo_status FROM establishments WHERE menuSlug IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT id, name, menuSlug, CASE WHEN coverImage IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_COVER' ELSE 'NO_COVER' END as cover_status, CASE WHEN logo IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_LOGO' ELSE 'NO_LOGO' END as logo_status FROM establishments WHERE menuSlug IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
